queries.question: In which city would you find Coachella located?
queries.sql: SELECT City FROM Festivals WHERE FestivalName = 'Coachella Music and Arts Festival';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city WHERE {
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals p:City ?city .
  ?festivals p:FestivalName ?festivalname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?festivalname_f) = "Coachella Music and Arts Festival")
}

queries.question: In which country and city would you find Coachella located?
queries.sql: SELECT Country, City FROM Festivals WHERE FestivalName = 'Coachella Music and Arts Festival';
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?country ?city WHERE {
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals p:Country ?country .
  ?festivals p:City ?city .
  ?festivals p:FestivalName ?festivalname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?festivalname_f) = "Coachella Music and Arts Festival")
}
